skills.name: Nimble Climber
skills.description: Speeds up climbing and vaulting.

skills.name: Marathon Runner
skills.description: Lowers stamina costs while moving.

skills.name: Slip and Slide
skills.description: Makes slides longer and faster.

skills.name: Youthful Lungs
skills.description: Raises maximum stamina.

skills.name: Sturdy Ankles
skills.description: Reduces fall damage from non-lethal heights.

skills.name: Carry The Momentum
skills.description: After a sprint dodge roll, sprinting is free for a short time (cooldown applies).

skills.name: Calming Stroll
skills.description: Walking regenerates stamina as if you were standing still.

skills.name: Effortless Roll
skills.description: Reduces stamina cost of dodge rolls.

skills.name: Crawl Before You Walk
skills.description: Increases crawl speed while downed.

skills.name: Off The Wall
skills.description: Extends wall-leap distance.

skills.name: Heroic Leap
skills.description: Increases sprint-dodge roll distance.

skills.name: Vigorous Vaulter
skills.description: Removes the vault slow when exhausted.

skills.name: Ready To Roll
skills.description: Widens the timing window for a Recovery Roll when falling.

skills.name: Vaults on Vaults on Vaults
skills.description: Makes vaulting cost no stamina.

skills.name: Vault Spring
skills.description: Lets you jump at the end of a vault.

skills.name: Agile Croucher
skills.description: Increases movement speed while crouched.

skills.name: Looter's Instincts
skills.description: Reveals items in containers faster while searching.

skills.name: Revitalizing Squat
skills.description: Improves stamina regeneration while crouched.

skills.name: Silent Scavenger
skills.description: Reduces noise created when looting.

skills.name: In-round Crafting
skills.description: Enables field crafting while Topside.

skills.name: Suffer In Silence
skills.description: Makes your movement quieter while critically hurt.

skills.name: Good As New
skills.description: Boosts stamina regeneration during healing effects.

skills.name: Broad Shoulders
skills.description: Raises maximum carry weight.

skills.name: Traveling Tinkerer
skills.description: Unlocks additional field-craftable items.

skills.name: Stubborn Mule
skills.description: Lessens how much over-encumbrance slows stamina regeneration.

skills.name: Looter's Luck
skills.description: Gives a chance to reveal twice as many items while looting.

skills.name: One Raider's Scraps
skills.description: Small chance to find extra field-crafted items in Raider containers.

skills.name: Three Deep Breaths
skills.description: Recovers stamina more quickly after an ability drains it.

skills.name: Security Breach
skills.description: Allows breaching of Security Lockers.

skills.name: Minesweeper
skills.description: Enables disarming of mines and explosive deployables at close range.

skills.name: Used To The Weight
skills.description: Reduces the movement speed penalty while carrying a shield.

skills.name: Blast-Born
skills.description: Dampens the hearing impact of nearby explosions.

skills.name: Gentle Pressure
skills.description: Lowers the noise you make when breaching.

skills.name: Fight Or Flight
skills.description: Restores a set amount of stamina when you take combat damage (has a cooldown).

skills.name: Proficient Pryer
skills.description: Shortens the time to breach doors and containers.

skills.name: Survivor's Stamina
skills.description: Speeds up stamina regeneration when you're critically hurt.

skills.name: Unburdened Roll
skills.description: After your shield breaks, your first dodge roll within a brief window costs no stamina.

skills.name: Downed But Determined
skills.description: Extends the time before you fully collapse when downed.

skills.name: A Little Extra
skills.description: Breaching an object yields some resources.

skills.name: Effortless Swing
skills.description: Reduces stamina cost of melee abilities.

skills.name: Turtle Crawl
skills.description: Lowers damage taken while you're downed.

skills.name: Loaded Arms
skills.description: Decreases how much your equipped weapon adds to encumbrance.

skills.name: Sky-Clearing Swing
skills.description: Increases melee damage to drones.

skills.name: Back On Your Feet
skills.description: Regenerates health up to a limit when critically hurt.

skills.name: Flyswatter
skills.description: Destroys Wasps and Turrets with a single melee hit.
